untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of two distinct bottoms (Adam and Eve) with specific morphological characteristics (narrow V-shaped vs. wide rounded), dissimilarity comparison, and sequencing. No available indicators can directly detect multi-bar pattern structure, bottom classification, or shape differentiation. Would require custom pattern recognition logic or candle-by-candle structural analysis beyond scope of technical indicator library.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using lower_wick > body to approximate V-shaped bottom behavior and close < sma_20 to confirm downtrend environment. Exit condition uses pivot level as reversal target. However, core AEDB pattern definition (two distinct bottoms, Adam narrower than Eve, specific morphology) cannot be expressed with available indicators. Recommend implementing as custom pattern detection function in backtest engine.
